name: iPhone 14 Pro - Deep Purple
description: Experience the iPhone 14 Pro in stunning Deep Purple. Features a 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR display with ProMotion and Always-On technology.

name: iPhone 14 Pro - Space Black
description: The classic Space Black iPhone 14 Pro. Powerful A16 Bionic chip and a pro camera system for incredible photos and videos.

name: iPhone 14 Pro - Silver
description: Elegant Silver iPhone 14 Pro. Durable design with Ceramic Shield and water resistance.

name: iPhone 14 Pro - Gold
description: Premium Gold iPhone 14 Pro. The ultimate smartphone experience with the Dynamic Island and 48MP Main camera.

name: PlayStation 5 Console
description: Experience lightning-fast loading with an ultra-high speed SSD, deeper immersion with support for haptic feedback, adaptive triggers and 3D Audio, and an all-new generation of incredible PlayStation games.

name: DualSense Wireless Controller
description: Discover a deeper, highly immersive gaming experience with the innovative new PS5 controller, featuring haptic feedback and dynamic trigger effects.

name: MacBook Air (M2 Chip)
description: Strikingly thin and fast, the MacBook Air features the M2 chip for exceptional performance and up to 18 hours of battery life.

name: MacBook Pro 14-inch (M2 Pro)
description: MacBook Pro with M2 Pro or M2 Max takes power and efficiency farther than ever. With all-day battery life and a stunning Liquid Retina XDR display.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones
description: Leading noise canceling headphones with exceptional sound quality and smart features.

name: iPad Pro 12.9-inch (M2)
description: The ultimate iPad experience. Now with next-generation M2 performance and the world's most advanced display.

name: Nintendo Switch – OLED Model
description: Play at home on the TV or on-the-go with a vibrant 7-inch OLED screen with the Nintendo Switch – OLED Model.

name: Apple Watch Ultra 2
description: The most rugged and capable Apple Watch. Designed for outdoor adventures and supercharged workouts.

name: Dell UltraSharp 32" 4K Monitor
description: Experience world-class performance on this 31.5" 4K monitor featuring IPS Black technology and a built-in hub.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S
description: An iconic mouse remastered. Feel every moment of your workflow with even more precision, tactility, and performance.

name: Sony Alpha a7 IV Mirrorless Camera
description: An all-arounder that pushes the boundaries of what a full-frame camera can do. 33MP sensor and 4K 60p video.

name: Keychron Q1 Mechanical Keyboard
description: A fully customizable mechanical keyboard with QMK/VIA support and a solid aluminum body.
